headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Packaging Corp of America, Lowers Price Target to $226
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   maintains Packaging Corp of America (NYSE:PKG) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $234 to $226.
